name: American Flag Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine margarine, egg white, and vanilla extract.
2. In another mixing bowl, combine flour, sugar, and baking powder.
3. Mix wet ingredients with dry ingredients just until moistened.
4. Divide dough into 3 equal portions.
5. Tint one portion with red food coloring and another portion with blue food coloring.
6. Mix thoroughly to get a uniform color. The untinted dough represents white.
7. Form each portion into long bars.
8. Wrap each bar in waxed paper.
9. Refrigerate until easy to handle.
10. Remove wax paper and stack bars in the desired color arrangement on top of each other.
11. Wrap entire bars in waxed paper again and chill until firm.
12. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
13. Slice bars into 1/4-inch thick slices.
14. Place on a baking sheet.
15. Bake for 12 minutes.
